sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108362" key="u(podu/stropos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποδύστροπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n108362.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat stubborn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:145" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.145</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
